childhood.familyBackground: Family fled mainland China to Taiwan when he was young. Grew up in Taiwan during a period of rapid industrialization.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 어릴 때 가족이 중국 본토에서 대만으로 피신. 급속한 산업화 시기의 대만에서 성장.
childhood.education: Earned a degree in electrical engineering from National Taiwan University. MBA from the University of Houston.
childhood.educationKo: 국립대만대학교 전기공학 학위. 휴스턴 대학교 MBA 취득.
childhood.earlyLife: Developed a passion for electronics and engineering from a young age.

careerTimeline.event: Quanta became the world's largest notebook computer manufacturer
careerTimeline.eventKo: 콴타가 세계 최대 노트북 제조업체로 등극

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into server manufacturing for cloud computing
Became a key supplier for Apple, Dell, HP, and other major brands
careerTimeline.eventKo: 애플, 델, HP 등 주요 브랜드의 핵심 공급업체로 부상

careerTimeline.event: AI server demand drove massive revenue growth as key NVIDIA partner
careerTimeline.eventKo: NVIDIA 핵심 파트너로서 AI 서버 수요가 매출 급성장 견인

failures.description: Global financial crisis caused sharp decline in PC demand
failures.lesson: Diversifying beyond PCs into servers and cloud infrastructure provided resilience
failures.lessonKo: PC를 넘어 서버와 클라우드 인프라로 다각화가 회복력 제공

quotes.text: Manufacturing is an art. Every product must be perfect.
quotes.textKo: 제조는 예술이다. 모든 제품은 완벽해야 한다.

personalTraits.knownFor: Building the world's largest laptop manufacturer and pivoting successfully into AI servers
personalTraits.knownForKo: 세계 최대 노트북 제조업체를 구축하고 AI 서버로 성공적으로 전환
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and technology research in Taiwan.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 대만의 교육 및 기술 연구 지원.
